channel.title: Banking Fluency for Bitcoin-Age Operators
channel.itunes:author: FRIDAY
channel.description: A structured daily course for understanding banks, credit unions, regulation, payments, lending, custody, and the institutional context for Bitcoin-age financial infrastructure.
channel.itunes:summary: A structured daily course for understanding banks, credit unions, regulation, payments, lending, custody, and the institutional context for Bitcoin-age financial infrastructure.

item.title: Day 001: What Is A Bank
item.description: Banking Fluency Day 001: What Is A Bank. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.
item.itunes:summary: Banking Fluency Day 001: What Is A Bank. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.
